items.title: RAM kits are now sold with one fake RAM stick alongside a real one to create a performance illusion — 1+1 'value pack' offers desperate psychological relief as the memory shortage worsens
items.dek: TL;DR: A 1+1 value pack to be offered, having 1 functioning RAM and 1 fake, feelgood, shell. submitted by /u/Significant-Colour [link] [comments]
items.body: TL;DR: A 1+1 value pack to be offered, having 1 functioning RAM and 1 fake, feelgood, shell. submitted by /u/Significant-Colour [link] [comments]

items.title: Explosion at Amsterdam Jewish school 'a deliberate attack' says mayor
items.dek: Security had been increased at Jewish public institutions following an earlier incident in Rotterdam.
